<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Posts from this day in earlier years"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/posts/on-this-day"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Posts created on today's month/day in a prior year. Not paginated —
the result set is at most a handful of posts.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
